reviews.review_description: The game forgets to mention anywhere that it is an NFT game that requires you to connect a wallet and give them your info to play. It is a rip off of Pokémon and this is their second attempt to it. They were sued by Nintendo for their first game. After developer response: 1st you guys were hit with a copyright from Nintendo because of the previous attempt to rip off Pokémon. 2nd you own the name to your game but every single thing in the game is a copy of Pokémon. All you did was change the name. 3rd You guys require a sign up on your nft website. Most games let you create an account inside the game without the need to sign up for a different product. NOTICE ALL THE FAKE REVIEWS POSTED ON THE SAME DAY LOL

developer_response.body:
Sad to see a full desinformation review. Here is the truth;

1. The game is totally free, without any info requirements except an email / username / pw (which is that case for most of games). 

2. You do not need to connect any wallets to play the game, just to register an account here: https://app-v2.revomon.io/authentication/register

3. Revomon is a registered company under the license 818301 in the UAE owning the Revomon IP. We have never been sued by Nintendo or any Pokémon related branches. Such fake statements could be prosecuted.

reviews.review_title: Best game on my headset honestly
reviews.review_description:
I love playing revomon, I feel so awesome catching shiny and legendary revomon, my heart skips a beat when the notification shows up saying, a legendary revomon has appeared near you! 

Install the game and catch rare and powerful revomon, use it in your team of 6 or sell it for Revo tokens or bnb and make a profit. Yes you can make money from catching a strong/rare revomon and selling It to other players/collectors/battlers, if you have alot of free time, this game is for you!

They never mentioned this until I tried making an account, but this is just an NFT/Crypto program.
Additionally, there is NO way to delete your account or remove your email from their database, so don't even sign up for a website.
I wish I could give this 0 stars.
I’ve been trying to log in. I’ve tried 50 times nothing happens I still don’t know what the game even is about. If anyone has tips to log in please tell me, thank you.
Every time I try to log in or sign up to play I get a purple screen and brings me right back to the startup screen, can someone tell me what is wrong?
It is just used to make a quick buck off of kids who get access to a cripto wallet

reviews.review_title: Great Game for Pokemon Fans Out There
reviews.review_description: I Recommend this game because I'm a Pokémon Fans and playing this game on a Virtual Reality is AWESOME, You can collect Revomons, Trade, Battle and Interact with Fellow Trainers. and its FREE. What are you waiting for Trainers?

This game is lots of fun. You are placed in an online world, with lots of creatures to capture and train and evolve. It's full of people to battle, trade with and talk to. It had clans to team up with others and an in game market place to sell your revomon.

100% free. Must try.

NO - You DONT need to use any crypto. just create an account on the site without connecting any wallet.
YES - you can sell them as nfts for crypto but just if you wish to do it. Otherwise simply ignore all this crypto stuff.

No. They were not sued by nintendo. there are tons of pokemon like games around the world.. they simply decided to create their own game.

It's the best free game you can find in VR if you like pokemon like games. Go around and catch the revomons you like. 

The team is always in touch with the community and working on the project constantly.
Join discord and telegram group to find out more and see what will be added in the future.

I feel like it would be a good game but I can’t login it just goes to a pink screen: UPDATE now that I found out how to log in this game is amazing I love everything about it from meeting new people or the exciting thrill of finding a rare or shiny I love the community of this game as well the people that are really good are so helpful

reviews.review_title: I don’t know how to join a lobby
reviews.review_description:
I will give this game a 5 because it seems really cool but I don’t know how to join a game I am really confused on how to do it. Like do I make a account then log into it on the game or what????? 

Thanks

I was able to play on my quest 1 just fine. But I got my quest 2 not long ago now I can’t login. If this is something on the creators part, I hope it gets fixed soon. If not, rip to a once amazing game. I’m still giving it 5 stars tho cause when it was playable, it really WAS amazing.

reviews.review_title: Good game but weird login bug
reviews.review_description: It wont let me log into my account anymore i dont know why i can login on my phone but i just get stuck on the login screen on my oculus its honestly sucks cuz i like this game alot and would love to get back into it again

Overall this game is great but a few things that make it annoying is that everytime you want to talk you have to press a button, also there are not enough places to go to/explore. The final reason this game gets annoying is there is no fast trave so anywhere you go you have to walk. But the rest of the game is great.
It worked for me at but I can’t change my password

Just tried it and automatically can't play it. I'll go on and it'll say 100% loading for either 15 odd minutes and when it's done you have to wait for it to load up to about 1452 and I waited about 10 minutes for it to be not near done

This game is really fulfill my childhood. I play in VR  when I caught my first legendary Raival. I send it out for being my partner and it follow me when I walk around. I feel really fantastic. I hope this game become popular in the future. Thank you for make the great game. Good job Revo’s team.

reviews.review_title: The Future of Gaming- True ownership of
reviews.review_description:
Revomon Beta is a rising star. In Beta, you'll get to experience catching, training, and evolving monsters. The dev team is active on discord and telegram and mostly  listens to the community. Since its still under development there are a few bugs but they are fixed as soon as it's found.

This is not just a game, its an awesome community that I've been a part of and stuck with for over a year and will continue becsuse I believe in true ownership of in game assets and cross platform gaming.

I'm jessi3 in game. Or nurseboy. This game is immense. I've been playing over a year now. Its so immersive and everyone in the community is able to create their own character. The discord is a welcoming dysfunctional family lol. All of the creators and developers are highly involved and are players too.
Cant believe the 1 star percentage is so high but I think its been a learning curve and a very fast evolution but they accept criticism so they will correct the errors that have led to bad reviews
Awful
